# Rahul Moharana

Rahul Moharana is a Full Stack Developer and Creative Engineer based in Cuttack, India. He specializes in building high-performance web applications, creative digital experiences, and scalable backend systems.

## Primary Skills
- **Languages:** JavaScript (ES6+), C, Java
- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, React Native, Framer Motion, GSAP, Three.js, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express
- **Databases:** MongoDB, PostgreSQL
- **Tools & DevOps:** Figma, Git, Vercel, AWS, Docker

## Key Projects
- **Velix Agency Portal:** A premium, high-end agency website with cinematic animations and performance optimizations.
- **Marion Construction:** A professional multi-page portal for a construction business with project showcases.
- **Portfolio Website:** A high-performance, GSAP-powered portfolio demonstrating creative engineering and full-stack capabilities.

## Contact & Links
- **Website:** https://rahulmoharana.dev
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/rahulmoharana
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/rahulmoharana
- **Email:** contact@rahulmoharana.dev

## Availability
Rahul is currently available for full-stack development roles, freelance projects, and creative collaborations.
